summary: Frontend redesign verification of /app MobileApp.jsx complete. All redesign requirements PASSED: full-bleed candlestick chart background sits behind content (z-index correct), small square avatar chip replaces old 230px round robot, live-price chip responsive (hidden < sm, visible >= 640px), 'powered by LOYISO' / Robot List / Broker Bridge cards present and interactive. Pairs drawer opens/closes via mobile-action-pairs, broker tap renders broker-approved-card (no mobile-broker-form regression), install prompt fires on synthetic beforeinstallprompt. Responsive: phone frame centered on tablet (768) and desktop (1920, x=760 w=400), vertical-rl side tickers visible only on lg+ (writing-mode vertical-rl width=15px on 1920; offsetParent=false on 768 — correct).

issues: Install prompt card overlaps the bottom of the Broker bridge / Robot list cards in the visible viewport — content sits behind the prompt. Consider adding bottom padding when mobile-install-prompt is visible so cards don't scroll under it.

Background chart candles are also visible bleeding through the Robot List / Broker glass cards (the cards have low fill opacity). Looks intentional for cyberpunk vibe but may impact readability on small screens — consider raising ea-glass-chart background alpha slightly.

action_items: Optional: increase ea-glass-chart background opacity slightly so chart candles don't bleed through Robot List / Broker cards on small screens.
Optional: add bottom safe-area padding to mobile-app-screen content when mobile-install-prompt is visible so the bottom card isn't covered.
critical_code_review_comments: MobileApp.jsx is 1514 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting drawers (PairsDrawer, ConnectDrawer, MenuDrawer), PhoneFrame, ChartBackground, LivePriceChip into separate modules.

LivePriceChip uses setInterval polling a ref every 500ms — works but a useSyncExternalStore or callback-based subscription from ChartBackground would be cleaner and avoid wasted renders when price hasn't changed.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Redesigned mobile shell: data-testid='mobile-chart-bg' is the full-bleed SVG inside an absolute inset-0 wrapper (parent z=auto, content layers use relative z-10). data-testid='mobile-ea-avatar-chip' replaces old 230px round robot. data-testid='mobile-live-price-chip' is gated by Tailwind 'hidden sm:flex' (>= 640px). PhoneFrame side tickers gated by 'hidden lg:flex' (>= 1024px). All previous testids preserved. Screenshots: /tmp/redesign_mobile_390.png, /tmp/redesign_tablet_768.png, /tmp/redesign_desktop_1920.png.
